seo.title: Modern Slavery Statement | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Services Ltd modern slavery statement — our commitment to preventing modern slavery, due diligence processes, training, and compliance with the Modern Slavery Act 2015.
seo.focus_keyword: modern slavery statement vigil care staffing

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Modern Slavery Statement
fields.sub: Vigil Services Ltd. is committed to preventing modern slavery in all aspects of its business operations and supply chains. This statement outlines our efforts to identify and mitigate the risk of modern slavery within our organization and highlights the steps we are taking to ensure compliance with the Modern Slavery Act 2015.

fields.heading: Organizational Structure and Supply Chains
fields.body: Vigil Services Ltd. is a staff recruitment agency located in Ilford, East London. We supply Health Care Assistants, support workers, kitchen assistants and domestic workers

fields.heading: Policies on Modern Slavery
fields.body: We have in place a comprehensive set of policies that reflect our commitment to combating modern slavery, including: Anti-Slavery Policy: We have implemented a clear and robust policy prohibiting all forms of modern slavery within our organization and supply chains. Supplier Code of Conduct: Our Supplier Code of Conduct outlines our expectations for suppliers regarding labour practices, human rights, and ethical conduct.

fields.heading: Due Diligence Processes
fields.body: We recognize the importance of conducting due diligence to identify and assess potential risks of modern slavery in our supply chains. Our due diligence processes include: Risk Assessment: We regularly assess the risk of modern slavery in our supply chains, taking into account the nature of our business and the countries in which we operate. Supplier Audits: We conduct audits of high-risk suppliers to evaluate their compliance with our anti-slavery policies and the Modern Slavery Act.

fields.heading: Training and Awareness
fields.body: We are committed to raising awareness and understanding of modern slavery issues among our employees and suppliers. We provide training to relevant personnel on recognizing and addressing modern slavery risks.

fields.heading: Measuring Effectiveness
fields.body: We measure the effectiveness of our anti-slavery efforts through key performance indicators (KPIs), regular audits, and feedback mechanisms. We are committed to continuous improvement in combating modern slavery.

fields.heading: Reporting and Communication
fields.body: Vigil Services Ltd. is dedicated to transparent communication on our actions and progress in addressing modern slavery. This statement is published on our website, and updates will be provided as part of our annual reporting.
